scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter text-foreground
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-foreground

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: 8px base scale (Tailwind default). Generous padding to emulate Linear/Vercel density.

motion.philosophy: Snappy, precise, hardware-accelerated. No sluggish easing.

logo_spec.concept: Minimal geometric 'E' where negative space forms an upward arrow.
logo_spec.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" class="w-8 h-8 text-primary"><path d="M10 8h24v6H18l6 6-6 6h16v6H10V8z" fill="currentColor"/><path d="M24 20l-6-6v12l6-6z" fill="var(--background)"/></svg>
logo_spec.note: The cutout 'M24 20l-6-6v12l6-6z' creates the distinct upward-right arrow pointing out of the 'E'. Developer must ensure '--background' maps to the actual page background color so it acts as true negative space.

header.style: Sticky at top, z-50. Glassmorphism enabled.
header.layout: Flex container. Left: Logo. Center: Cmd+K Search trigger button (pill shaped, muted bg). Right: Notifications bell, Credits pill, Avatar.

sidebar.style: Collapsible vertical left sidebar. Thin border-r.
sidebar.layout: Top: Compact logo. Middle: Nav links with animated Phosphor/Lucide icons. Bottom: Settings, Profile.
sidebar.active_state: bg-primary/10 text-primary border-r-2 border-primary (or subtle left indicator).

command_palette.content: bg-card border-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden max-w-2xl mx-auto mt-[10vh]
command_palette.input: text-lg p-4 bg-transparent border-b border-border focus:ring-0

stat_card.layout: Bento grid item. p-6 rounded-xl border border-border bg-card relative overflow-hidden
stat_card.content: Top-left: Title & Icon. Bottom-left: Count-up number (text-4xl). Bottom-right: Sparkline chart or subtle trend badge.
stat_card.motion: Framer motion card_hover. Inner glow on hover using framer motion.

quick_action_tile.layout: Aspect-square or wide rectangle. bg-muted/50 hover:bg-muted border border-transparent hover:border-border transition-all rounded-lg p-4 flex flex-col items-start justify-between cursor-pointer
quick_action_tile.icon: w-8 h-8 rounded-md bg-background flex items-center justify-center text-primary shadow-sm

resume_card.layout: Vertical card. Top 2/3: Thumbnail preview of resume (muted bg, inner border). Bottom 1/3: Title, ATS Score Badge, Updated date.
resume_card.interactions: Hover lifts card (y:-4) and reveals absolute positioned 'Edit'/'Download' buttons over thumbnail.

editor_shell.left_sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border bg-card p-4 overflow-y-auto (Sections list).
editor_shell.editor_toolbar: h-14 border-b border-border flex items-center px-4 gap-2 (Undo, Redo, Auto-save pill, Export).
editor_shell.right_preview: w-[45%] lg:w-1/2 bg-muted p-8 overflow-y-auto flex justify-center items-start shadow-inner

floating_ai_copilot.trigger: Bottom-right fixed. w-12 h-12 rounded-full ai_gradient text-white shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-110 transition-transform
floating_ai_copilot.panel: Absolute bottom-16 right-0 w-80 h-[500px] bg-card border border-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden
floating_ai_copilot.header: bg-muted p-3 flex justify-between border-b border-border

empty_state.layout: Flex col center, py-16 px-4 text-center
empty_state.visual: Abstract subtle geometric SVG or high-end monochrome illustration (not generic vector people)
empty_state.text: text-lg font-medium text-foreground mt-6. text-sm text-muted-foreground max-w-sm mx-auto mt-2

hero.layout: Min-h-[80vh] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center px-4 relative overflow-hidden
hero.background: Abstract radial gradient orbs (Blue & Purple) blurred heavily in background behind content.
hero.headline: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tighter max-w-4xl mx-auto leading-tight
hero.cta_group: flex gap-4 justify-center mt-8. Primary: Get Started (bg-primary). Secondary: View Demo (outline).
hero.visual_proof: Animated dashboard mock-up tilting in 3D (React Three Fiber or Framer Motion perspective transform) immediately below fold.

sections: Interactive Demo: Before/After ATS comparison slider.
Features Bento Grid: Left-aligned text, asymmetrical boxes.
Testimonials: Marquee of monochrome professional portraits.

home_dashboard.hero: Greeting 'Good evening, Ashish 👋'. Subtle day/time text.
home_dashboard.stats: Row of 4 stat cards (Resumes, Applications, Avg ATS, Cover Letters).
home_dashboard.quick_actions: Grid of 6 actions (Upload Resume, Paste JD, Optimize, Generate CL, Interview Prep, Import LinkedIn).
home_dashboard.content_split: Grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Left span-2: Activity Timeline & Weekly Chart. Right span-1: AI Insights list (actionable alerts).

ats_analyzer.workflow: Stepper: Upload -> Paste JD -> Analyze -> Results
ats_analyzer.results_layout: Top: Radar chart (Skills, Format, Keywords, Impact). Bottom: Grid of score cards. Right sidebar: Actionable one-click fix suggestions.

cover_letter_studio.layout: 3-panel. Left: Inputs (Target Role, Company, Key achievements). Middle: AI Chat & Tone Controls (sliders for Confidence, Professionalism). Right: Live Letter Preview (A4 aspect ratio, editable text area).

abstract_backgrounds.description: Abstract composition showcasing modern architectural elements with dramatic lighting.

portraits.description: Confident business professional in a blue suit and tie, smiling.

company_logos.description: Black and white photo of a modern office building

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for standard text against background colors. Use APCA preferred.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="resume-edit-button"`).
accessibility_and_testing.reduced_motion: Wrap framer-motion animations with useReducedMotion hooks to disable if user prefers reduced motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: Extend Tailwind theme with the colors specified in this JSON. Define CSS variables for them in globals.css for light and dark modes.
Use standard Radix/Shadcn UI components but heavily customize borders, radii, and shadows to match this high-end, high-contrast SaaS look.
Do NOT center-align the app dashboard layouts. Maintain an asymmetric, left-aligned reading flow.
Avoid Bootstrap-style styling. Prefer pure HTML/Tailwind over rigidly abstracting everything into cards if pure wrappers provide better visual flow.
Strictly follow the Logo SVG implementation with the negative space arrow. Ensure it works on both Light and Dark backgrounds.
Embed framer motion transitions for route changes, stat card hovers, and list staggers.
Build the Editor shell using a resizable/split-pane layout if possible, or standard flex boundaries. Preview pane must simulate US Letter/A4 aspect ratio.
Implement the Floating AI Copilot as an overlaid interactive element with the ai_gradient trigger.
